case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS DANCE MAGIC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $315.00 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT DANCE MAGIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-07-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
